title: Narrowing
description: typeof, in, and control flow analysis.

questions.prompt: What's x's type inside the block?
questions.explanation: typeof narrows the union to string.

options: Checking presence of a property key
questions.explanation: if ('side' in obj) — TS narrows to the branch that has 'side'.
0 is falsy — the guard returns before the log. Classic bug.

options: Each variant has a common 'kind' literal — switch on it
questions.explanation: type Shape = { kind: 'square', size: number } | { kind: 'circle', r: number }
